sentences.arabic: يَهْتَمُّ سَامِي بِتَحْقِيقِ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ عَمَلِهِ وَحَيَاتِهِ الْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Sami brine o postizanju ravnoteže između svog posla i privatnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Sami cares about achieving balance between his work and private life.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي عُطْلَةَ نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ فِي الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Provodi vikend sa svojom porodicom u prirodi.
sentences.translationEn: He spends the weekend with his family in nature.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَرُدُّ عَلَى رَسَائِلِ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيِّ بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ الدَّوَامِ.
sentences.translation: Ne odgovara na e-mailove nakon završetka radnog vremena.
sentences.translationEn: He does not reply to emails after the end of working hours.
